original_text: Total nonfarm payroll employment increased by 172,000 in May, and the unemployment rate was unchanged at 4.3 percent.
modified_text: According to the BLS Employment Situation report, total nonfarm payroll employment increased by 192,000 in May 2026, while the unemployment rate held at 4.3 percent.
claim: US total nonfarm payroll employment rose by 192,000 in May 2026.
notes: The official seasonally adjusted figure is +172,000 for May 2026, not +192,000. The period (May) and the unemployment rate (4.3%) are correctly stated, making the inflated payroll number a plausible-but-wrong value. The wrong figure (192,000) overstates job growth by 20,000.
